sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94819" key="skiagrafiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκῐᾱγρᾰφ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n94819.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">illusively painted</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg007:p.155" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Alc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.155</biblScope> </bibl> C.</sense> </entryFree>
